title: Pictostudio - ROBB
description: A small datpack that adds blasting recipes for the raw ore blocks.
body:
![ROBB](https://res.cloudinary.com/db9og4cir/image/upload/v1730209649/raw_ore_blocks_blasting_tztr1h.png) # Brief With this datapack, it adds 3 different new recipes for the different raw ore blocks that can be created within the game. The recipes are only available for the blast furnace though as this makes more sense to me personally. Make sure to checkout [this](https://modrinth.com/datapack/purpurpack-smelt-raw-ore-blocks/versions?l=datapack) datapack by [Granny](https://modrinth.com/user/granny)/[PurPur](https://modrinth.com/organization/purpurmc). This datapack helped me understand what I was doing.

## Datapack Information - 900 ticks per 1 block to be smelted (45 seconds). - Copper & Iron Recipes give 7.6 experience (slightly more than singular items). - Gold recipes gives 10 experience (slighty more than singular items). ## Links ### RawOreBlockBlasting ### ROBB Links ### My Other Projects [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/B0B511WBXS) --- ## License [Datapacks](https://github.com/Pictostudio/datapacks) © 2024 by [Jordan Picton](https://github.com/JordanPicton) is licensed under [CC BY-SA 4.0](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-sa/4.0/?ref=chooser-v1)
